overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City's downtown district. The player character moves along neon-lit sidewalks past the Tyger Claws graffiti, under holographic billboards, and approaches a busy intersection with futuristic architecture and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with graffiti-covered wall and street railing

events.description: passing through a group of pedestrians walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, following a group of pedestrians past the red graffiti wall

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians walking ahead at a leisurely pace

entered.detail: red painted wall with black graffiti reading TYGER CLAWS
futuristic building with curved facade and red neon trim
black metal railing separating sidewalk from street
elevated walkway structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a narrow city sidewalk. A prominent red wall with 'TYGER CLAWS' graffiti fills the right side while a futuristic curved building with neon accents rises on the left. The camera follows a small group of pedestrians moving in the same direction, passing black metal railings that separate the walkway from the street where sparse traffic moves.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with overhead digital signage

events.description: moving from graffiti wall section into area with dense overhead holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk, passing under suspended advertising displays

entered.detail: large suspended digital screens displaying colorful advertisements spanning the street
red rectangular sign with white text reading Pandamith

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider commercial street section dominated by massive overhead digital billboards suspended across the road. The Pandamith store sign becomes visible on the left as the graffiti wall falls behind. The camera moves steadily forward under the glowing advertisements, with the curved neon building now visible further down on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner plaza with vertical advertising displays

events.description: turning left at the corner around the teal building with tiger mural

agents.ego_description: walking past large vertical billboards then turning left at the corner near a food cart

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a blue food cart with umbrella

entered.detail: tall illuminated billboard displaying a woman in purple jacket with 16 FLAVORS text
teal-colored building facade with large red tiger graphic painted on the side
small blue food vending cart with umbrella parked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a corner dominated by a massive vertical billboard advertising '16 FLAVORS' featuring a woman in a purple jacket. A teal building with a distinctive red tiger mural occupies the right side, with a small food cart parked at the corner. The player turns left around this building, moving from the open street into a slightly more sheltered area under building overhangs.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with pedestrian signal visible and vehicles waiting at intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and preparing to cross the multi-lane street

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall pole with pedestrian walk signal and traffic lights
line of futuristic cars parked along the street including a red sedan
high-rise building with reflective glass facade and multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection with bright morning sunlight. The camera approaches a marked crosswalk with zebra stripes, passing a traffic light pole with pedestrian signals. Several futuristic vehicles are parked along the multi-lane street, and a tall glass building rises on the left. The teal building with the tiger mural recedes into the background as the player reaches the intersection corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense urban corridor that transitions from a narrow, graffiti-lined alley into a bright, open city intersection. It begins by walking along a narrow sidewalk flanked by a red wall with Tyger Claws graffiti and a curved neon building, following a small group of pedestrians past black metal railings. As the camera moves forward, the space expands into a wider commercial street where the graffiti fades and massive digital billboards, including a Pandamith sign, begin to loom overhead. The scene then shifts toward a corner dominated by a vertical 16 Flavors advertisement and a teal building with a tiger mural, before the camera turns left under building overhangs. Finally, the view opens into a wide intersection bathed in morning sunlight, passing a zebra-striped crosswalk and parked futuristic vehicles as a tall glass building rises in the distance.
